offer: For accounting firms managing 10–50 clients, daily reconciliation pain causes cash flow gaps. We automate bank statement matching instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Daily reconciliation of bank statements with internal ledgers is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try Daily bank statement import and Discrepancy notifications on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Provide one-click export of simple reports
